_doc: Category 3 — single-quote. Primary fix escapes single quotes as double-quoted strings inside the JSON value (\"…\"). Works on every shell. The Bash-family fallback keeps the single quotes (only CMD breaks).

scripts.chat:admin: node src/cli.js --message 'What is the version in the package.json?'
